dungeon: GENUINE ROTF run through THE SHATTERS (the dark crystalline-cavern dungeon). Recovered enemy/boss lines: Rock Construct + Steel Construct (the heal-each-other/impervious Construct mechanic) and Marble Colossus (a Shatters mini-boss — which we ALSO have built as an OC realm boss, see flag below). 2 boss fights captured (bossends b001 radial-ring arena, b002 geometric/hex arena). Event-feed announcer personas + /30 counter also visible.
map: DOCUMENTED-from-minimaps+frames: THE SHATTERS layout — dark crystalline CAVERNS (black with blue/cyan crystal glow) branching into themed rooms: a GREEN TOXIC/SWAMP room (poison floor, yellow hazard dots), orange/brown CONSTRUCT ROOMS (boxy), grey stone chambers, and CIRCULAR/DOMED BOSS ARENAS (b001 = circular radial-ring arena; b002 = grey domed arena). Branching room-graph (multiple mini-boss paths converging) typical of The Shatters; exact path order not traced (1 loading entry).

mechanics: DOCUMENTED: a THE SHATTERS run. CONSTRUCT mechanic confirmed via taunts — Rock Construct 'We are impervious to non-[magic]' (damage-immune until broken) + Steel Construct 'Silly squishy. We heal our [allies]' (constructs heal each other; must be killed together/in order). Marble Colossus 'I feel myself... Slipping...' (crumbling death line). ATTACKS (DOCUMENTED-from-bossends): b001 = circular arena radial RING/NOVA (purple/blue/green); b002 = domed arena GEOMETRIC/HEX bullet outline (orange/yellow, fixedAngle). EVENT-FEED multi-persona announcer system confirmed again: 'Cyclops' (Skull Shrine spawn) + 'Deathmage' (/30 Pentaract counter) + 'RockNotifier' — different NPC personas announce realm events with /30 counters.
